summary: Completed testing of VTC checkout payment flow via C# proxy. All 12 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend checkout empty state and MyAccount card management UI verified working correctly.
seed_data_creation: Test client account testclient@zont.cab was pre-registered
context_for_next_testing_agent: Checkout flow uses C# proxy at api.zont.cab for all payment operations. SetupIntent flow via /api/proxy/client/add-card returns real Stripe clientSecret. direct_payment.py was removed - /api/payment/* returns 404 as expected. Test client testclient@zont.cab can be used for authenticated API testing.
